tech.title: NASA InSight lands on Mars
tech.description: A robotic lander designed to study the deep interior of Mars successfully touches down on Mars.

tech.title: First transistor prototype
tech.description: Bell Labs researchers demonstrate the first working transistor, launching the modern electronics age.

news.title: First Army–Navy football game
news.description: The United States Military Academy and Naval Academy play their first football game at West Point.

culture.title: World of Warcraft explodes in popularity
culture.description: Blizzard’s MMORPG becomes a cultural phenomenon and reshapes online gaming.

birthdays.name: C.S. Lewis
birthdays.description: Author of The Chronicles of Narnia.
